name: v08 mode1 stock canbox + stock CDC CAN/UART sideband
usb_identity: unchanged stock CDC/proprietary canbox interface; no gs_usb
mode1_policy: programmer canbox logic remains default and runs immediately

sideband_commands.0x70: CAN log start/stop; events returned as BB A1 41 16 70 02 bus flags id_le dlc data checksum
sideband_commands.0x73: UART raw TX through USART2 PA2
sideband_commands.0x74: CAN raw TX on CAN1/C-CAN or CAN2/M-CAN without changing USB interface

safety_notes: UART RX is mirrored after stock USART2 RX byte read, so stock parser still receives bytes.
CAN RX hooks call the original CAN pop function before emitting USB copies.
CAN TX assumes stock firmware already initialized CAN1/CAN2 timings.
